NCT03511664.name: VISION
NCT03511664.group: Post-ARPI + post-taxane PSMA+ mCRPC, 177Lu-PSMA-617 + SoC vs SoC alone (rPFS HR)

allOutcomes.title: Radiographic progression-free survival (primary alternative, BICR-assessed, HR)

NCT03511664.snippet: Source: Sartor O et al. NEJM 2021;385:1091-1103 (VISION).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 831 adults with PSMA-positive (68Ga-PSMA-11 PET/CT) metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer who had received >=1 ARPI and 1-2 taxane regimens, randomized 2:1 open-label to 177Lu-PSMA-617 7.4 GBq IV every 6 weeks (up to 6 cycles) plus protocol-permitted SoC (n=551) vs SoC alone (n=280).

evidence.label: Primary - Overall Survival and rPFS
evidence.text: Median overall survival: 177Lu-PSMA-617+SoC 15.3 months vs SoC 11.3 months; hazard ratio 0.62 (95% CI 0.52-0.74; P<0.001). Median BICR-assessed radiographic PFS: 8.7 vs 3.4 months; HR 0.40 (99.2% CI 0.29-0.57; P<0.001). Both alternative primary endpoints met.

evidence.label: Secondary - PSA Response and Safety
evidence.text: PSA50 response: 177Lu-PSMA 46% vs SoC 7.1%. ORR in measurable disease: 29.8% vs 1.7%. Grade >=3 AEs more common with 177Lu-PSMA (52.7% vs 38.0%), driven by anaemia, thrombocytopaenia; xerostomia mild-moderate in 39%. No new safety signals.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR stratified by LDH and liver metastases. D2 SOME CONCERNS - open-label allocation (SoC-heterogeneous comparator; mitigated by BICR rPFS and OS hard endpoint). D3 LOW - 89% completion. D4 LOW - BICR for rPFS, OS objective. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: MALE; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~1. Patients must have the ability to understand and sign an approved informed consent form (ICF).~2. Patients must have the ability to understand and comply with all protocol requirements.~3. Patients must be >= 18 years of age.~4. Patients must have an Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status of 0 to 2.~5. Patients must have a life expectancy >6 months.~6. Patients must have histological, pathological, and/or cytological confirmation of prostate cancer...

NCT04689828.name: PSMAfore
NCT04689828.group: Post-ARPI, taxane-naive PSMA+ mCRPC, 177Lu-PSMA-617 vs ARPI switch (rPFS HR, primary)
NCT04689828.snippet: Source: Morris MJ et al. Lancet 2024;404:1227-1239 (PSMAfore).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 468 adults with PSMA-positive mCRPC who had progressed on one ARPI and were taxane-naive randomized 1:1 open-label to 177Lu-PSMA-617 7.4 GBq IV Q6W (up to 6 cycles; n=234) or ARPI switch (abiraterone or enzalutamide; n=234). Crossover to 177Lu permitted at progression.

evidence.label: Primary - rPFS at Interim Analysis
evidence.text: Median BICR-assessed radiographic PFS: 177Lu-PSMA-617 12.0 months vs ARPI switch 5.6 months; hazard ratio 0.43 (95% CI 0.33-0.54; P<0.0001). Primary endpoint met at pre-specified interim analysis.

evidence.label: Secondary - OS (crossover-adjusted) and PSA
evidence.text: OS unadjusted HR 1.16 (favouring control due to extensive crossover); crossover-adjusted HR 0.80 (95% CI 0.58-1.10) - hypothesis-generating. PSA50 response: 177Lu 57.6% vs ARPI 20.4%. Safety: xerostomia, anaemia, fatigue more common on 177Lu; ARPI switch had more hypertension and falls.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR stratified by LDH and prior ARPI duration. D2 SOME CONCERNS - open-label + high crossover (confounds OS). D3 LOW - 90% completion. D4 LOW - BICR rPFS. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: MALE; min age 18 Years; max age 100 Years; healthy volunteers: f. title: RapidMeta Oncology | 177Lu-PSMA-617 Radioligand Therapy for mCRPC v1.1
